item.title:
IRAN’S MIDDLE EAST AMBITIONS ARE DEAD
“Iran planned to dominate the Middle East and destroy Israel. Like Iran itself, those plans are now dead.” — President Donald J. Trump
item.description:
IRAN’S MIDDLE EAST AMBITIONS ARE DEAD

“Iran planned to dominate the Middle East and destroy Israel. Like Iran itself, those plans are now dead.”
— President Donald J. Trump

item.title: *TRUMP: US 'OBLITERATED' MILITARY TARGETS ON IRAN'S KHARG ISLAND
item.description: *TRUMP: US 'OBLITERATED' MILITARY TARGETS ON IRAN'S KHARG ISLAND

item.title:
U.S. STRIKE ON KHARG ISLAND — WARNING TO IRAN
Moments ago, on my orders, U.S. Central Command carried out one of the most powerful airstrikes in Middle East history, destroying every military target on Iran’s Kharg Island.
Our weapons are unmatched, but I chose not to strike the island’s oil infrastructure out of restraint. If Iran—or anyone—threatens free passage through the Strait of Hormuz, that decision will change immediately.
I rebuilt the U.S. military into the most powerful force on Earth. Iran cannot defend against anything we choose to strike.
Iran will never obtain a nuclear weapon or threaten the United States, the Middle East, or the world. Its military and those supporting this regime would be wise to stand down and preserve what remains of their country.
— President Donald J. Trump
item.description:
U.S. STRIKE ON KHARG ISLAND — WARNING TO IRAN

Moments ago, on my orders, U.S. Central Command carried out one of the most powerful airstrikes in Middle East history, destroying every military target on Iran’s Kharg Island.

Our weapons are unmatched, but I chose not to strike the island’s oil infrastructure out of restraint. If Iran—or anyone—threatens free passage through the Strait of Hormuz, that decision will change immediately.

I rebuilt the U.S. military into the most powerful force on Earth. Iran cannot defend against anything we choose to strike.

Iran will never obtain a nuclear weapon or threaten the United States, the Middle East, or the world. Its military and those supporting this regime would be wise to stand down and preserve what remains of their country.

— President Donald J. Trump

item.title: TRUMP: HOWEVER, SHOULD IRAN, OR ANYONE ELSE, DO ANYTHING TO INTERFERE WITH FREE AND SAFE PASSAGE OF SHIPS THROUGH STRAIT OF HORMUZ, I WILL IMMEDIATELY RECONSIDER THIS DECISION

item.title:
US OFFERS $10M BOUNTY FOR INFORMATION ON IRANIAN LEADERS
The U.S. Department of State is offering up to $10 million for information on senior officials tied to Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps, according to the Rewards for Justice.
Those sought include Mojtaba Khamenei, Ali Asghar Hejazi, and Esmail Khatib, along with other senior defense and IRGC figures.
item.description:
US OFFERS $10M BOUNTY FOR INFORMATION ON IRANIAN LEADERS

The U.S. Department of State is offering up to $10 million for information on senior officials tied to Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps, according to the Rewards for Justice.

Those sought include Mojtaba Khamenei, Ali Asghar Hejazi, and Esmail Khatib, along with other senior defense and IRGC figures.

item.title: 🚨 AMBREY SAYS MERCHANT VESSEL REPORTED HEARING SOUND OF EXPLOSION AT UNDETERMINED DISTANCE FROM THE VESSEL, APPROXIMATELY IN UAE'S AL SHARJAH ANCHORAGE
item.description: 🚨 AMBREY SAYS MERCHANT VESSEL REPORTED HEARING SOUND OF EXPLOSION AT UNDETERMINED DISTANCE FROM THE VESSEL, APPROXIMATELY IN UAE'S AL SHARJAH ANCHORAGE

item.title:
MAMDANI PROPOSES SLASHING NY ESTATE TAX EXEMPTION TO $750K
Zohran Mamdani wants to cut New York’s estate tax exemption from over $7 million to $750,000 and raise the top rate from 16% to 50% to help close a $5.4 billion city budget gap.
The plan, part of a memo to state lawmakers, would make New York’s estate tax the lowest exemption in the U.S., far below other states like Oregon ($1 million) or Connecticut ($14 million).
Experts warn high estate and income taxes could drive wealthy residents away, reducing revenue. The proposal is unlikely to pass this year, as neither the legislature nor Governor Kathy Hochul included it in their budget plans.
item.description:
MAMDANI PROPOSES SLASHING NY ESTATE TAX EXEMPTION TO $750K

Zohran Mamdani wants to cut New York’s estate tax exemption from over $7 million to $750,000 and raise the top rate from 16% to 50% to help close a $5.4 billion city budget gap.

The plan, part of a memo to state lawmakers, would make New York’s estate tax the lowest exemption in the U.S., far below other states like Oregon ($1 million) or Connecticut ($14 million).

Experts warn high estate and income taxes could drive wealthy residents away, reducing revenue. The proposal is unlikely to pass this year, as neither the legislature nor Governor Kathy Hochul included it in their budget plans.

item.description: CRUDE FUTURES TURN POSITIVE AS STRAIT OF HORMUZ REMAINS CLOSED BY WAR

item.title:
BOFA: STOCK MARKET NEAR LEVEL THAT COULD SPUR POLICY ACTION
Michael Hartnett warned that if the S&P 500 drops further—around 6,600, just 1% below recent levels—it could trigger a policy response from the White House or the Federal Reserve.
Hartnett cited soaring oil prices, a protracted Iran war, and global instability as catalysts. He also flagged overbought assets like gold, semiconductors, and European stocks, while oversold sectors such as software, bank loans, and bitcoin may stabilize once policymakers act. Potential interventions could include easing tariffs, de-escalating the conflict, or Fed stimulus measures like rate cuts or bond purchases.
item.description:
BOFA: STOCK MARKET NEAR LEVEL THAT COULD SPUR POLICY ACTION

Michael Hartnett warned that if the S&P 500 drops further—around 6,600, just 1% below recent levels—it could trigger a policy response from the White House or the Federal Reserve.

Hartnett cited soaring oil prices, a protracted Iran war, and global instability as catalysts. He also flagged overbought assets like gold, semiconductors, and European stocks, while oversold sectors such as software, bank loans, and bitcoin may stabilize once policymakers act. Potential interventions could include easing tariffs, de-escalating the conflict, or Fed stimulus measures like rate cuts or bond purchases.

item.title: ELON MUSK HAS ORDERED ANOTHER ROUND OF JOB CUTS AT XAI - FT
item.description: ELON MUSK HAS ORDERED ANOTHER ROUND OF JOB CUTS AT XAI - FT

item.title:
IRAN WAR DISRUPTS ZINC SUPPLIES TO CHINA
China’s zinc smelters face raw-material shortages after shipments from Iran were halted amid the ongoing conflict, compounding delays from Russia’s new Ozernoye mine.
Iran and Russia together supply about 15% of China’s zinc feedstock. Port closures at Bandar Abbas in the Strait of Hormuz and canceled cargoes from Oman have tightened supplies, forcing Chinese buyers to seek alternatives for May and June.
Industry analysts warn the conflict could ripple through other commodities markets, with aluminum, nickel, copper, and fertilizers already seeing price pressures.
item.description:
IRAN WAR DISRUPTS ZINC SUPPLIES TO CHINA

China’s zinc smelters face raw-material shortages after shipments from Iran were halted amid the ongoing conflict, compounding delays from Russia’s new Ozernoye mine.

Iran and Russia together supply about 15% of China’s zinc feedstock. Port closures at Bandar Abbas in the Strait of Hormuz and canceled cargoes from Oman have tightened supplies, forcing Chinese buyers to seek alternatives for May and June.

Industry analysts warn the conflict could ripple through other commodities markets, with aluminum, nickel, copper, and fertilizers already seeing price pressures.
